name: Potato Soup (Cream Style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes, onion, celery, and water in a large saucepan. Add dill weed, Mrs. Dash, and chives; simmer until potatoes are tender, about 30 minutes.
2. In a pint jar, mix together the milk and flour thoroughly.
3. Add the milk and flour mixture to the potato mixture; simmer for 5-10 minutes, or until thickened.
VARIATIONS:
Add 1/4 teaspoon ground pepper, 1 teaspoon basil leaves, and/or 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder in addition to or instead of other herbs. Blend part of the soup mixture in a blender if desired.
